title: katoptrizomai #2734
definition:
1) to show in a mirror, to make to reflect, to mirror
 2) to look at one's self in a mirror
 3) to behold one's self in a mirror
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to show in a mirror, to make to reflect, to mirror
 2) to look at one's self in a mirror
 3) to behold one's self in a mirror

    NASB:  to reflect as a mirror:
